title: Duncan and Rausher 2020
author: Rausher, Mark
license_note: Zenodo record metadata license field: cc-zero
description:
Data set for Figures 2-4 from Duncan and Rausher,  Selection. favors loss of floral pigmentation in a highly selfing morning glory.    

 Data are for qPCR and pyrosequencing of anthocyanin pathway genes, and microsatellite genotypes for plants from various study sites.
